triggerReason: Rainfall exceeded 300mm in 7 days combined with 12 blast events
recommendedAction: Evacuate sector immediately. No worker entry until further notice.

triggerReason: Slope angle 48 degrees exceeds safe limit. Rainfall 380mm in 7 days.
recommendedAction: Restrict all access. Deploy monitoring team.

triggerReason: Crack report confirmed critical by engineer. Zone upgraded.
recommendedAction: Evacuate zone. Inspect full slope face before resuming.

triggerReason: Blast count 7 in last 7 days crossed threshold.
recommendedAction: Restrict blasting. Monitor slope displacement daily.

triggerReason: Rainfall 265mm in 7 days. Laterite soil saturation risk.
recommendedAction: Monitor every 6 hours. Halt excavation near eastern face.

triggerReason: 3 water seepage reports submitted in last 48 hours.
recommendedAction: Check drainage channels. Restrict heavy equipment.

triggerReason: Rainfall 230mm combined with active excavation.
recommendedAction: Suspend excavation during rain. Monitor slope face.

triggerReason: Rainfall crossed 130mm threshold for yellow alert.
recommendedAction: Monitor daily. Reduce blast intensity.

triggerReason: Crack report flagged for review.
recommendedAction: Engineer review required before clearing workers.

triggerReason: Blast count 5 reached yellow threshold.
recommendedAction: Reduce blasting frequency. Daily inspection required.

triggerReason: Rainfall 160mm approaching orange threshold.
recommendedAction: Monitor closely. Halt if rainfall exceeds 200mm.

triggerReason: Water seepage detected near slope base.
recommendedAction: Inspect drainage. Check for subsurface water flow.

triggerReason: 5 crack reports submitted in 7 days.
recommendedAction: Full slope inspection. Restrict worker movement.

triggerReason: Active exploration logged near unstable laterite wall.
recommendedAction: Limit excavation depth. Daily visual check.

triggerReason: Rainfall 200mm over 5 days with high humidity.
recommendedAction: Monitor slope. Deploy safety barriers on east wall.

triggerReason: ML model risk 85%. Slope 42° with 258mm rainfall. Blast count critical.
recommendedAction: Evacuate zone. Suspend all operations. Deploy rapid response.

triggerReason: Critical rainfall 274mm + steep slope 44°. Immediate hazard confirmed.
recommendedAction: Evacuate zone. Suspend all operations. Deploy rapid response.

triggerReason: Blast frequency exceeded safe threshold. Soil moisture rising.
recommendedAction: Restrict heavy equipment. Increase monitoring to 4-hour intervals.

triggerReason: Rainfall 132mm. Soil saturation risk rising on basalt face.
recommendedAction: Restrict heavy equipment. Increase monitoring to 4-hour intervals.

triggerReason: Crack reports submitted. Slope face under stress.
recommendedAction: Restrict heavy equipment. Increase monitoring to 4-hour intervals.

triggerReason: Blast count 7 in 7 days crossed orange threshold.
recommendedAction: Restrict heavy equipment. Increase monitoring to 4-hour intervals.

triggerReason: Soil moisture sensor anomaly. Precautionary escalation triggered.
recommendedAction: Restrict heavy equipment. Increase monitoring to 4-hour intervals.

triggerReason: Rainfall 168mm with active excavation near unstable face.
recommendedAction: Restrict heavy equipment. Increase monitoring to 4-hour intervals.
